prompt: Tag every open to-do in my 'Studio move' project with 'boxes'. Only the ones still open, and only in that project.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE p.title='Studio move' AND t.type=0 AND t.status=0 AND t.trashed=0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag g ON tt.tags=g.uuid WHERE tt.tasks=t.uuid AND g.title='boxes')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tt.tasks) FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag g ON tt.tags=g.uuid WHERE g.title='boxes'
